title: kengyilia thoroldiana var. melanthera
intro: Kengyilia thoroldiana var. melanthera is a plant species in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass. It is traditionally used in Tibetan medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and promoting digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, Kengyilia thoroldiana var. melanthera is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are used to treat various ailments.
